  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.client.common.autoconfigure.properties used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.client.common.autoconfigure
    Class
    Description
    McpClientCommonProperties
    Common Configuration properties for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) clients shared for all transport types.
    McpSseClientProperties
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    McpSseClientProperties.SseParameters
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Parameters for configuring an SSE connection to an MCP server.
    McpStdioClientProperties
    Configuration properties for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) stdio client.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.client.common.autoconfigure.properties used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.client.common.autoconfigure.properties
    Class
    Description
    McpClientCommonProperties.ClientType
    Client types supported by the MCP client.
    McpClientCommonProperties.Toolcallback
    Represents a callback configuration for tools.
    McpSseClientProperties.SseParameters
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Parameters for configuring an SSE connection to an MCP server.
    McpStdioClientProperties.Parameters
    Record representing the parameters for an MCP server connection.
    McpStreamableHttpClientProperties.ConnectionParameters
    Parameters for configuring an Streamable Http connection to an MCP server.

    Class
    Description
    McpStreamableHttpClientProperties
    Configuration properties for Streamable Http client connections.
